name: Ranch Round Steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the round steak into serving pieces, each about half an inch thick.
2. Trim excess fat from the meat and make shallow slashes on the edges to prevent curling during cooking.
3. In a bowl, mix together the flour, dry mustard, salt, and pepper to coat the steak evenly.
4. Reserve some of this flour mixture for later use.
5. Heat shortening in a skillet over medium-high heat. Brown the meat in batches on both sides until nicely browned.
6. Once browned, push the meat to one side of the pan and stir in the reserved flour mixture.
7. Add water and Worcestershire sauce to the skillet. Stir everything together.
8. Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 1 to 1 1/4 hours, or until the steak is tender. The cooking liquid should thicken and bubble gently.
9. Remove the meat to a serving platter. Skim any excess fat from the gravy.
10. Drizzle the gravy over the meat and serve.
